hintDisplay: Sujeto: mi abuela / Verbo: preparar (negación) / Complemento: la receta tradicional / Conector: aunque / Tiempo: hoy

correctSentence: Although she has all the ingredients, my grandmother does not prepare the traditional recipe today.
